meta.title: Talking Aurora with the man who investigated it for the UK Government
meta.description:
Recently, we did a two-part series on the legendary aircraft known as "Aurora." As luck would have it, that story reached Nick Pope — the man responsible for finding answers about Aurora sightings for the UK Government in the 1990s. 

Here's what he had to say about these sightings.

You can follow Nick Pope on Twitter here: https://twitter.com/nickpopemod

Our previous Aurora Coverage:
Part 1: https://youtu.be/J_r31ibMshA
Part 2: https://youtu.be/HQdpborKJUY

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
